ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birthplace of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* Current team of the player */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player became a rookie */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is located */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player left the team */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract started */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player for the team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player started playing the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player stopped playing the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fgp" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "ftp" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win or loss) */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fgp" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the player */,
  "ftp" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
